{{Quote|I was at Dantooine, with the military. I saw what they can do. We can't stop them. We can't.|Imsatad|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest">''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''</ref>}}
'''Imsatad''' was an officer in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] military who later fought for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], and afterwards defected to the [[Peace Brigade]].

==Biography==
===Imperial and New Republic service===
Imsatad served under [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in his [[Thrawn campaign|campaign]] against the New Republic in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], and he was part of the garrison on [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Talon Karrde]] infiltrated the [[Mount Tantiss/Legends|Mount Tantiss]] base and defeated [[Joruus C'baoth]]. This experience may have accounted for his later hostility towards the Jedi, but it also gave him an appreciation of the capabilities of [[vornskr]]s and [[Ysalamiri/Legends|ysalamiri]] in tracking down and nullifying [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitives]].

By the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Imsatad was serving with the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] military—a rough-looking man whose hair was by now turning gray. He participated in the [[Battle of Dantooine (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Dantooine]], but his experiences here convinced him that the Yuuzhan Vong could not be beaten, and he also persuaded himself that the war was the fault of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]].

Imsatad decided to switch sides, and when [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] claimed that the war would end if the Republic surrendered the Jedi Knights, he organized a force to [[Invasion of Yavin 4|attack]] the [[Jedi academy]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], hoping to capture the Jedi students there and hand them over to the Yuuzhan Vong.

===Raid on Yavin 4===
{{Quote|I do what I do for the good of the galaxy.|Imsatad to [[Talon Karrde]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest" />}}
Imsatad's squadron for this raid consisted of thirteen combat-capable starships, including [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]], armed [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighters]], [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wing escort starfighters]], and a [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] which served as his command ship. He claimed to be an officer of the [[Peace Brigade]], with the rank of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]], and one of his subordinates, [[Kot Murno]], identified himself as a [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]], but some of their men and ships, such as [[Remis Vehn]] and his freighter, were apparently hired specifically for the attack.

Imsatad sent one ship ahead to scout out Yavin 4, which lurked in orbit for several days before he brought his main group in. The near-simultaneous arrival of [[Anakin Solo]] alerted the Jedi to the attack, however, and the Academy quickly went into hiding. The Jedi were still trapped on the surface, but Imsatad's initial plans had been frustrated, and he was unable to track the Jedi down in the dense jungle and the caverns and chambers of the Temple complex.

Next, [[Talon Karrde]] arrived, dispatched by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to evacuate the Academy. The ''[[Wild Karrde]]'' was outgunned by Imsatad's squadron, and the ex-Imperial distrusted this "traitor to the Empire", but Karrde was able to lure him with a promise of vornskrs and ysalamiri to help him in his search. The Brigader decided to take the risk, and Karrde was allowed to land, albeit under heavy guard. In spite of these precautions Karrde was able to trick the Brigaders, and evacuated [[Kam Solusar]], [[Tionne Solusar|Tionne]] and most of the young Jedi aboard the ''Wild Karrde''. Only [[Tahiri Veila]] was captured, although Jedi Master [[Ikrit]] was killed, and Anakin, [[Valin Horn]], and [[Sannah]] remained trapped on the jungle moon.

===Aftermath and execution===
Shortly afterwards, a large Yuuzhan Vong squadron arrived in-system, ostensibly to tap water from [[Stroiketcy]], but also apparently to raid the Jedi Academy and in preparation for the establishment of a [[damutek]] on the jungle moon. They were surprised to find the Peace Brigade there, and angered to discover that the Jedi had gone, but it was a week before a senior officer, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Tsaak Vootuh]], arrived to meet with the Peace Brigade Captain. Imsatad initially hesitated to reveal that he had Tahiri prisoner, but sensing the Yuuzhan Vong's irritation he offered to hand her over, insisting that only his intervention had prevented Karrde from rescuing all the Jedi. He did not reveal that some of the Jedi were still trapped on the moon, however—perhaps, as Anakin had predicted, he didn't want to reveal his own failure to capture them.

But Imsatad had miscalculated. Karrde's ships had remained at the edge of the system, and Tsaak Vootuh had guessed that there must be more than one Jedi left to rescue on Yavin 4. Realizing his mistake, the Brigader attempted to show his continuing usefulness by offering the information that Anakin Solo was among the trapped group, but the Yuuzhan Vong commander could no longer disguise his contempt for the infidel. As he had probably planned all along, Tsaak Vootuh signaled for [[Subaltern]] [[Vo Lian]] to impale the Brigader with his [[amphistaff]]. Subsequently, the Yuuzhan Vong ships seem to have destroyed the Peace Brigade vessels, while the warriors captured most of Imsatad's men for ritual execution.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}}
